edge_hypothesis: The ACCEPT-winning MACD spec (PF=1.35) used stop=1.0x ATR, which may be too tight for volatile ETH — good trades get stopped out before momentum continuation completes. Widening the stop to 1.5-2.0x ATR gives MACD crossover trades more room to breathe through normal volatility, while maintaining 2:1 to 2.7:1 R:R to preserve the fee-drag advantage. Advisory data confirms trending PF~1.40 on MACD — adding ADX>=15 regime gate removes the weakest ranging signals without over-filtering (ADX>=25 caused supertrend to produce only 16 trades). Regime assumption: TRENDING (ADX>15-20). Invalidation: if PF < 1.0 across all 3 variants with 100+ trades each, the wider stop hypothesis is refuted and tight stops (1.0x) remain optimal for MACD.

variants.name: macd_wide_stop_moderate_tp
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross with wider stop (1.5x ATR) and moderate TP (3.0x ATR). Tests whether giving trades more room improves PF by reducing premature stop-outs. R:R = 2:1. Compared to ACCEPT winner (stop 1.0, TP 3.5), this trades narrower TP for wider stop — hypothesis is that fewer stopped-out winners compensates for slightly lower reward per trade.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Wider stop increases max adverse excursion per trade
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line crossover for momentum shift detection
ATR_14 for stop/TP sizing; ADX_14 for regime gate

variants.name: macd_maximum_ride_trending
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross with widest stop (2.0x ATR) and maximum TP (4.0x ATR). Designed to let winning trades run to full momentum exhaustion. With 2:1 R:R, even 35% win rate produces PF>1.0. Widest parameters in the MACD sweep — tests the upper bound of the risk-reward optimization space.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed regime gate to maximize trade count).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed regime gate to maximize trade count).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 4.0x TP may be too wide — hit rate could be very low on 4h bars
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line crossover — maximum ride variant
ATR_14 for wide stop/TP; ADX_14 > 15 relaxed regime gate

variants.name: macd_tight_stop_extreme_tp
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross keeping the ACCEPT winner's tight stop (1.0x ATR) but pushing TP to 4.0x ATR (4:1 R:R). Tests whether the existing tight-stop signal quality is good enough to capture rare but large moves. At 4:1 R:R, only 20% win rate needed for PF>1.0. This is the asymmetric payoff variant — most trades lose small, winners are outsized.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
ADX_14 > 25 (strict trending gate — only strongest momentum).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
ADX_14 > 25 (strict trending gate — only strongest momentum).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Strict ADX>25 gate may reduce trade count below 20
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Max drawdown cap: 15% (tight cap for quality-filtered variant).

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line crossover — asymmetric payoff variant
EMA_50 trend context + ADX_14 > 25 strict regime gate
